inputs.review: Battery lasts two full days and the screen is gorgeous. Best phone I've owned.
It works. Setup was fine, nothing surprising, nothing to complain about.
Stopped charging after three weeks. Support never replied. Avoid.

Camera   is   AMAZING!!!   colors pop, low-light is great.


Highly recommend.
Arrived on time. Packaging was a bit beaten up but the product itself looks ok.
Took almost a month to arrive and the box was crushed in transit, but the espresso machine itself is superb — rich crema every single morning.
Lightning-fast shipping and the courier was lovely, but the earbuds crackle in one ear and the battery dies within an hour. The product is a letdown.
Oh brilliant, another 'waterproof' watch that died the first time it saw rain. Worth every penny, truly.
Don't believe the glowing reviews — this is not the durable, premium knife they promise. It chipped on day two.
The fabric is soft and the colour is lovely, but it shrank in the first wash and the stitching is already loose. Hard to call it good or bad.
It's a 2-metre USB-C cable, black, exactly as pictured. Bought it to replace a lost one.
Runs a touch warm under heavy load, but honestly this laptop is phenomenal — fast, silent, and the display is stunning. No regrets.
Looks premium and the unboxing was nice, but the firmware is buggy, key features are missing, and I already filed a return.
Setup took longer than expected and the manual is confusing, yet once running it's quiet, fast, and exactly what I needed.
For a cheap desk fan it moves air. Nothing remarkable, nothing terrible — just adequate.
I suppose it's impressive that it lasted a whole week before the handle fell off.
Despite the gorgeous aesthetics and premium materials, it overheats after ten minutes and smells like burning plastic.
Really can't fault the battery life on this thing — easily gets through two days of heavy use.
Amazing Black Friday price, but the tablet stutters, the screen flickers, and I regret keeping it.
La batería dura dos días enteros y la pantalla es preciosa. El mejor móvil que he tenido.
Qué maravilla, otro reloj 'resistente al agua' que murió la primera vez que vio la lluvia. Vale cada céntimo, de verdad.
Hat nach drei Wochen aufgehört zu laden. Der Support hat nie geantwortet. Finger weg.
Zwei Meter langes USB-C-Kabel in Schwarz, genau wie abgebildet. Ersatz für ein verlorenes Exemplar.
Arrivé à l'heure. L'emballage était un peu abîmé mais le produit lui-même a l'air correct.
Ne croyez pas les avis élogieux — ce n'est pas le couteau durable et haut de gamme qu'ils promettent. Il s'est ébréché au bout de deux jours.
Fotocamera fantastica!!! I colori sono vividi e funziona benissimo al buio. Consigliatissimo.
La batteria dura tantissimo, ma soprattutto lo schermo è spettacolare. Nessun rimpianto.
